title: iOS Chrome mobile player clipped: cap html height at 100svh
description: v8.3.8.8 bumped --player-height 100→200px to address controls clipped behind iOS Chrome's persistent bottom nav. That treats a symptom: the body itself is sized via var(--app-height, 100dvh) and on iOS Chrome both the JS-set --app-height (visualViewport.height) and the 100dvh fallback include the area behind the bottom toolbar, so the player's bottom rows extend behind the toolbar regardless of player height. Fix: cap html height at 100svh via min(). Plan: shell.css:15 + comment update at 213-230, shell.js:887-906 comment, Playwright iOS-Chrome regression test, CHANGELOG v8.3.8.9, dev → QA → Qing real-device proof → release.

title: Pin Debian apt versions in Dockerfile
description: Phase 5b found 6 unpinned packages (ffmpeg, mediainfo, jq, curl, libsqlcipher-dev, openssl). Pin to current Trixie versions; revisit on next debian release.
